messages.content: Hello, I maintain the servers and deploy updates every Friday.
Mock AI reply: I understood your message about lesson 101.

aiFeedback: Good job using lesson vocabulary in the conversation.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Good fluency and strong use of lesson vocabulary.

commentsThread.content: Nice job. Try to expand your answer with one more example.
Sure, I also maintain deployment scripts for the team.

messages.content: Yesterday I reported my progress in the standup meeting.
Mock AI reply: I understood your message about lesson 102.

aiFeedback: Good effort. Try using more lesson vocabulary next time.

messages.content: We are investigating the production incident right now.
Mock AI reply: I understood your message about lesson 103.

aiFeedback: Good job using lesson vocabulary in the conversation.

commentsThread.content: Please explain what you are doing next after the investigation.

messages.content: Last sprint we estimated the tasks on Monday and prioritized the critical bugs first.
Mock AI reply: Great use of past simple for sprint planning context.

aiFeedback: Both key vocabulary items used correctly. Well done.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Clear and accurate use of sprint planning vocabulary.

commentsThread.content: Good sentence structure. Next time try to add more detail about what went wrong.

messages.content: First, you install the dependencies. Then you configure the environment variables in the config file.
Mock AI reply: Clear step-by-step instructions, well done.

aiFeedback: Excellent clarity and correct vocabulary usage.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Very natural and accurate explanation. Great work.

messages.content: The team has accomplished all the sprint goals this week and we have delivered the new feature to production.
Mock AI reply: Perfect use of present perfect for completed tasks.

aiFeedback: Both vocabulary items used correctly. Present perfect tense accurate.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Excellent work. The present perfect is used naturally here.

commentsThread.content: Perfect. Could you also say what will happen next?
Sure, next sprint we are going to focus on performance improvements.

messages.content: Right now I am refactoring the authentication module. We are also optimizing the slow database queries.
Mock AI reply: Good use of present continuous for current actions.

aiFeedback: Present continuous used correctly. Good vocabulary usage.

messages.content: Our new architecture scales automatically and each component integrates through a shared REST API.
Mock AI reply: Excellent technical English for a system architecture presentation.

aiFeedback: Sophisticated use of architecture vocabulary. Excellent performance.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Very advanced and accurate. You speak like a native engineer.

commentsThread.content: Outstanding. Your English is at a professional native level for technical topics.

messages.content: Yesterday I reported my progress and fixed two bugs during the day.
Mock AI reply: Well done. Clear and correct past simple usage.

aiFeedback: Clear communication in past simple. Good job.

messages.content: We are going to allocate all the tasks to the team by Friday and review the backlog in tomorrow's meeting.
Mock AI reply: Very good use of going to for planned future actions.

aiFeedback: Both vocabulary items used naturally. Future going to is accurate.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Natural and professional. Good sprint planning English.

messages.content: If the deployment failed, we would rollback to the previous version immediately.
Mock AI reply: Correct second conditional usage. Well done.

aiFeedback: Perfect second conditional. Vocabulary is accurately applied.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Excellent. Very confident use of the second conditional.

commentsThread.content: Can you also make a sentence using the failover vocabulary?
If the primary region went down, the failover system would activate automatically.

messages.content: We are currently resolving the service outage. The team is monitoring all recovery metrics in real time.
Mock AI reply: Accurate and professional incident communication.

aiFeedback: Excellent vocabulary use and professional communication style.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: This is exactly how a senior engineer communicates during an incident.

messages.content: React is more scalable than our old framework. In benchmark tests it is also faster.
Mock AI reply: Good comparatives usage for a framework comparison.

aiFeedback: Comparatives used correctly. Good vocabulary integration.

messages.content: The service that handles authentication is deployed as a separate microservice. Components that are decoupled can be updated independently.
Mock AI reply: Excellent use of relative clauses in a technical context.

aiFeedback: Near-perfect relative clause usage with accurate technical vocabulary.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Truly impressive. You are using defining relative clauses precisely and naturally.

messages.content: Only by investing in our infrastructure can we demonstrate consistent performance to the board.
Mock AI reply: Excellent formal inversion. Very impressive.

aiFeedback: Perfect formal inversion with strong technical vocabulary.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Outstanding board-level English. The inversion is flawless.

messages.content: I submitted the weekly status report to my manager yesterday and completed all assigned tasks.
Mock AI reply: Good past simple usage in a formal email context.

aiFeedback: Both vocabulary items used correctly. Sentence structure is clear.

messages.content: This API used to work fine, but it has now been deprecated. We migrated to the new endpoint last quarter.
Mock AI reply: Excellent use of used to for legacy system explanations.

aiFeedback: Used to is handled very naturally. Vocabulary is accurate.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Very professional. This is exactly how you would explain a legacy migration.

messages.content: After the meeting, the manager said that the deadline had been moved. She explained that the team had already finished testing.
Mock AI reply: Good reported speech with correct backshifting.

aiFeedback: Reported speech backshifting is accurate. Well done.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Natural and grammatically correct. Your meeting summaries will sound very professional.

messages.content: By the time we responded to the alert, the issue had already been detected. We had contained the breach before any data was stolen.
Mock AI reply: Excellent past perfect usage in a security context.

aiFeedback: Near-perfect past perfect usage. Technical vocabulary is highly accurate.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: This reads like a real post-mortem report. Excellent work.

messages.content: Each endpoint is documented in the Swagger file. User data is exposed through a secure REST API.
Mock AI reply: Correct use of passive voice for API documentation.

aiFeedback: Passive voice is used accurately. Vocabulary correctly applied.

messages.content: I want to propose a new caching strategy. Implementing it correctly requires careful planning.
Mock AI reply: Good gerund usage in a technical proposal context.

aiFeedback: Gerund after proposing used correctly. Vocabulary accurate.

messages.content: By the time we responded to the incident, it had already impacted thousands of users. We had detected the issue but the breach had not been fully contained.
Mock AI reply: Very strong past perfect usage in a post-mortem context.

aiFeedback: Excellent past perfect and passive combined. Very professional.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: This is post-mortem level English. Well done.

messages.content: It is essential that every developer comply with GDPR regulations. The manager requested that the code be audited before deployment.
Mock AI reply: Flawless subjunctive mood in a compliance context.

aiFeedback: Subjunctive used correctly in both cases. Highly impressive.

messages.content: Every PR should be reviewed by at least two developers. You ought to lint the code before committing.
Mock AI reply: Good use of modal verbs for recommendations.

aiFeedback: Modal verbs used accurately for advice. Vocabulary correct.

messages.content: By end of Q3, we will have released all three features. The team will have completed the roadmap milestones by then.
Mock AI reply: Excellent use of future perfect for roadmap planning.

aiFeedback: Future perfect used correctly for milestone planning. Very professional.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: Board-ready language. This is exactly how you present a roadmap.

messages.content: The monitoring system was sending alerts while the outage was spreading. We were diagnosing the issue when more users started reporting errors.

aiFeedback: Past continuous correctly used to describe parallel past actions.

messages.content: The API is fully documented. Each endpoint is exposed to external consumers through a secure gateway.
Mock AI reply: Good passive voice usage for API documentation.

aiFeedback: Passive voice is correctly used throughout. Vocabulary is accurate.

messages.content: Last week we estimated all tasks. We prioritized the critical bugs over new features.

aiFeedback: Good past simple use. Try to add more detail in your answers.

messages.content: I wrote an update in the project tracker. We hit the milestone ahead of schedule.
Mock AI reply: Good article usage in a status update context.

aiFeedback: Articles used correctly. Vocabulary is accurate.

messages.content: In the meeting, the PM said that the new feature had been approved. She also explained that the timeline had been moved forward by two weeks.
Mock AI reply: Good reported speech with correct backshifting.

aiFeedback: Reported speech is mostly correct. Good vocabulary integration.

messages.content: Yesterday I report my work in the standup.
Mock AI reply: I noticed a small tense error — use 'reported' for past.

aiFeedback: Tense error detected. Remember to use past simple for completed actions.

commentsThread.content: The key word here is 'reported' not 'report'. Please revise this lesson.

messages.content: Vue is more scalable and the benchmark scores are better than the old solution.
Mock AI reply: Good comparatives. Vocabulary used correctly.

aiFeedback: Comparatives used correctly. Good vocabulary integration.

messages.content: I was doing handover when the system started to escalate.

aiFeedback: Vocabulary used but phrasing needs improvement. Try again for better score.

messages.content: Code should be reviewed before merging. We ought to lint and run all tests before creating a PR.

aiFeedback: Modal verbs used correctly for recommendations.

messages.content: All customer records will be transferred to the new schema. Old data will be archived after the cutover.

aiFeedback: Passive future used correctly. Professional migration language.

messages.content: It was the misconfigured load balancer that caused the outage. What we found was a race condition in the auth flow.

aiFeedback: Cleft sentences used perfectly. This is advanced technical English.

teacherReviews.teacherComment: One of the best responses I have seen. This is boardroom-level English.

messages.content: We have accomplished all the sprint goals. The team has delivered three features to production this week.

aiFeedback: Present perfect used correctly. Vocabulary integrated naturally.

messages.content: When the pipeline broke, we were checking the logs. Alerts were firing while we were diagnosing the issue.

messages.content: I am currently refactoring the payment module. The team is also optimizing the query performance.
